column1: Added cohort-family metadata fields to support safer interpretation of related dataset rows. Four appended columns now track study_family, component_of_dataset_id, count_as_independent_cohort, and overlap_notes. These fields are shown in the Dataset Explorer detail view only, not the compact table, so accession-level browsing stays uncluttered while overlap context remains available for review. Absent study_family labels should not be interpreted as proof that a dataset is independent; many rows still require source-level cohort and sample-ID review before family overlap can be ruled out.
